offensive_abilities.name: Deploy Wheels
offensive_abilities.text: The pilot engages a lever that activates the clockwork components to transform the adaptable paddleboat's waterwheels into wheels for rolling along the ground. This grants the adaptable paddleboat Speed 20 feet and reduces its swim Speed to 5 feet. This transformation lasts until the pilot disengages the wheels by using this activity again.

offensive_abilities.name: Wind-Up
offensive_abilities.text: 10 minutes of wind-up, 1 hour of operational time, DC 16, standby

piloting_check.text: Driving Lore (DC 16), Sailing Lore (DC 16), or Crafting (DC 18)

statistics.space: 10 feet long, 5 feet wide, 4 feet high

stat_block.text: This amphibious clockwork boat moves through the water using clockwork waterwheels to keep a slow, consistent pace. When necessary, the boat uses ingenious clockwork to reposition the waterwheels and transform them into wheels suitable for land.

traits.name: Uncommon
traits.text: Something of uncommon rarity requires special training or comes from a particular culture or part of the world. Some character choices give access to uncommon options, and the GM can choose to allow access for anyone. Less is known about uncommon creatures than common creatures. They typically can't be summoned. The DC of Recall Knowledge checks related to these creature is increased by 2.
